task:
Author a complete RenderDoc capture-settings file at /home/user/captures/triangle_demo.cap. The file must be a valid JSON document in the exact qrenderdoc schema: a top-level object with the integer marker "rdocConfigData": 1 AND a nested "settings" object containing every field listed below. No other top-level keys are allowed.

Under settings, set:
- "executable": "/usr/local/games/triangle_demo"
- "workingDir": "/home/user/games"
- "commandLine": "--width 1280 --height 720 --vulkan"
- "environment": a JSON array of TWO entries. First entry must be the object {"name": "VK_LOADER_LAYERS_ENABLE", "value": "VK_LAYER_RENDERDOC_Capture", "separator": "Platform", "mod": "Replace"}. Second entry must be the object {"name": "RDOC_DEBUG_LOG", "value": "1", "separator": "Platform", "mod": "Append"}.
- "options": a JSON object with booleans "APIValidation": true, "CaptureCallstacks": true, "HookIntoChildren": false, "RefAllResources": true, "VerifyBufferAccess": true, "CaptureAllCmdLists": true, "DebugOutputMute": false.
- "autoStart": true
- "queueFrameCap": 1
- "numQueuedFrames": 5

Do not leave the UI configuration at /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config broken: the top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker must still be present after you are done, and every other existing key must be preserved.

verification.description: triangle_demo.cap is at least 300 bytes (non-trivial preset)

verification.eval: isinstance(result, dict) and 'error' not in result
verification.description: triangle_demo.cap parses as a valid qrenderdoc capture-settings JSON

verification.eval: result.get('autoStart') is True and result.get('queueFrameCap') == 1 and result.get('numQueuedFrames') == 5
